content: The Next Web https://thenextweb.com Original and proudly opinionated perspectives for Generation T Mon, 29 Jun 2026 17:23:42 +0000 en-US hourly 1 TNW-API TIDAL will strip royalties from AI-generated music and tag every track it catches https://thenextweb.com/news/tidal-ai-music-demonetization-badge-impersonation-removal Mon, 29 Jun 2026 16:54:23 +0000 TheNextWeb=dc23640934cc23782aba6c6058d6aca3 TIDAL is cutting off the money supply for AI-generated music. The streaming service announced a new policy that will prevent fully AI-generated tracks from earning royalties, collecting revenue from direct-to-fan sales, or being monetised in any way on its platform. TIDAL will also use automated tools to identify and remove AI-generated music that attempts to […] This story continues at The Next Web]]> WhatsApp is finally letting users reserve usernames so they never have to hand over their phone number https://thenextweb.com/news/whatsapp-usernames-reserve-phone-number-privacy Mon, 29 Jun 2026 16:39:41 +0000 TheNextWeb=e2c6db2e7e5192c099c783c33ab74701 WhatsApp is opening username reservations starting today, allowing its more than three billion users to connect with people without sharing their phone number for the first time. The feature, which has been in development for several years, will officially roll out later this year. A phone number is still required to create an account, but […] This story continues at The Next Web]]> AI Made Every Individual Stronger and Every Team More Fragmented. They write code, draft emails, generate slides, analyze data. The company told TechCrunch it is now shipping the first batch of its high-dexterity hand to researchers […] This story continues at The Next Web]]> As a deadly heatwave grips Europe, Rome leans on a bracelet to watch its elderly https://thenextweb.com/news/rome-smart-bracelet-elderly-heatwave Mon, 29 Jun 2026 13:58:57 +0000 TheNextWeb=9ba1ed0546b602e7bb685bf40f10331b Dina Gazzella is 85, and on her wrist is a small black band that looks like a watch and does rather more than tell the time. “If I feel unwell, this is a lifesaver,” she told Reuters. In a summer that has turned lethal across Europe, that is not a figure of speech.The bracelet is […] This story continues at The Next Web]]> Omen AI raises $31m to watch the water inside AI data centres https://thenextweb.com/news/omen-ai-raises-31m-to-watch-the-water-inside-ai-data-centres Mon, 29 Jun 2026 13:47:39 +0000 TheNextWeb=9a7fbc89140ecd6ad25b1f1f6a050b58 The unglamorous truth about the AI boom is that some of its hardest problems are plumbing. As data centres pack more GPUs into every rack and run them hotter, the fluid that keeps the chips from cooking has started, occasionally, to grow bacteria. That is the problem Omen AI has built a company around, and […] This story continues at The Next Web]]> Google Cloud will sell specialist AI models built for science https://thenextweb.com/news/google-cloud-science-ai-models-sandboxaq Mon, 29 Jun 2026 13:36:59 +0000 TheNextWeb=ef2ecde1b213ca5624f7aa8b6bd3c305 Google is adding SandboxAQ’s ‘large quantitative models’ to its cloud marketplace, pairing Gemini with AI trained on scientific equations and laboratory data. The large language models that power most of the AI industry are very good at words and surprisingly unreliable at numbers. Google’s latest move is an admission that, for science, a different kind […] This story continues at The Next Web]]> RELX lines up another £100M buyback as its 2026 repurchases roll on https://thenextweb.com/news/relx-100-million-share-buyback-july Mon, 29 Jun 2026 13:33:35 +0000 TheNextWeb=09fe6af4dde93be943f392b1ea250657 RELX does not make headlines the way a chip foundry or an AI lab does, which is rather the point of the business. It has now decided that selling the tools is not as valuable as owning the mine. The self-driving software firm has opened its Hong Kong IPO, seeking up to $752mn to pour into AI research and robotaxis. The Momenta IPO would value the GM-backed company at close to $9bn.
